help: Multiplicative perturbations on ECAV power cells. Per-level (L3/L4/L5) and per-subsystem (sensing/computing/communication) axes multiply on every cell. Dossier S2-01: keeping both axes free double-counts the same multiplicative uncertainty. Final classification: per-level = FIXED ONLY; per-subsystem = fixed/low/medium.

parameters.label: ECAV L3 per-level scale factor
parameters.physical_meaning: Multiplicative perturbation on the L3 ECAV power row.
parameters.why_fixed_only: Dossier S2-01 dual-axis duplication. Any non-fixed level keeps both axes free and double-counts the same variance. The per-subsystem axis (F09-F11) is the retained single axis; this row must be fixed for any scientifically defensible run.

parameters.label: ECAV L4 per-level scale factor
parameters.physical_meaning: Multiplicative perturbation on the L4 ECAV power row.

parameters.label: ECAV L5 per-level scale factor
parameters.physical_meaning: Multiplicative perturbation on the L5 ECAV power row.

parameters.label: ECAV sensing column scale factor
parameters.physical_meaning: Multiplicative perturbation on the ECAV sensing column; camera/LiDAR/radar mix variance.
parameters.why_default_free: Single retained axis after S2-01 fix.
parameters.why_high_rejected: MEDIUM sigma=0.30 already spans documented camera/LiDAR/radar measurement disagreement.

parameters.label: ECAV computing column scale factor
parameters.physical_meaning: Multiplicative perturbation on the ECAV computing column; vendor/ASIC variance.
parameters.why_high_rejected: MEDIUM sigma=0.20 is already at the edge of vendor benchmark disagreement.

parameters.label: ECAV communication column scale factor
parameters.physical_meaning: Multiplicative perturbation on the ECAV communication column; 5G vehicle-comm measurement spread. v5.1.7 narrowed sigma from 0.25 to 0.18 to match the 3GPP TS 38.840 power model spread across cellular and DSRC modem generations.
parameters.why_default_free: Single retained axis; largest of the three columns.
parameters.why_high_rejected: MEDIUM sigma=0.35 already spans documented 5G-vehicle-comm measurement spread.
